items.title: Autonomous Research via Adversarial Multi-Agent Collaboration (ARIS)
items.summary: A new research paper introduces ARIS, an autonomous multi-agent system designed to conduct research through adversarial collaboration, achieving state-of-the-art results on complex tasks.

items.title: Snap's $400M Deal with Perplexity Reportedly Ends Amicably
items.summary: Snap and AI search startup Perplexity have mutually terminated their substantial $400 million partnership, signaling a shift in their strategic alignment.

items.title: Barry Diller on AGI: Trust in Sam Altman is Irrelevant as AGI Nears
items.summary: Media mogul Barry Diller states that personal trust in figures like Sam Altman becomes irrelevant as the world approaches Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), emphasizing the broader societal implications.

items.title: Introducing ChatGPT Futures: Class of 2026
items.summary: OpenAI announces 'ChatGPT Futures: Class of 2026,' an initiative likely focused on fostering the next generation of AI talent or showcasing innovative applications of ChatGPT.

items.title: Uber Integrates OpenAI to Enhance User Experience and Driver Earnings
items.summary: Uber is leveraging OpenAI's technology to help users book rides faster and enable drivers to earn smarter, indicating a significant AI integration into its core services.

items.title: Listen Labs Raises $69M to Scale AI Customer Interviews After Viral Stunt
items.summary: Listen Labs secured $69 million in funding following a viral billboard hiring campaign, aiming to expand its AI-powered platform for conducting customer interviews.

items.title: OpenSeeker-v2 Pushes Limits of Search Agents with High-Difficulty Trajectories
items.summary: OpenSeeker-v2 is introduced as an advanced search agent, demonstrating improved capabilities in navigating informative and challenging search trajectories.

items.title: Google Partners with XPRIZE and Range Media for $3.5M Future Vision Film Competition
items.summary: Google is collaborating with XPRIZE and Range Media Partners to launch the $3.5 million 'Future Vision' film competition, encouraging creative storytelling around AI and technology.

items.title: AI Avatar v7 Released with Pose Capture and VS Code/Chrome Extensions
items.summary: AI Avatar v7 introduces new features including advanced pose capture and convenient VS Code and Chrome extensions, enhancing its utility for developers and users.

items.title: Why Agentic Engineering Must Replace Vibe Coding
items.summary: This article argues for a shift from 'vibe coding' to 'agentic engineering,' emphasizing the need for structured, AI-driven approaches in software development.

items.title: Build Your Own AI Butler: A Scheduled Agent That Runs Itself
items.summary: A guide is provided for building a personal AI butler, demonstrating how to create a scheduled agent that can autonomously execute tasks.

items.title: Is xAI a Neocloud Now? Speculation on Elon Musk's AI Venture
items.summary: TechCrunch explores whether Elon Musk's xAI is evolving into a 'neocloud' provider, suggesting a potential expansion beyond its initial AI model focus.

items.title: Hallucinations Undermine Trust; Metacognition is a Way Forward
items.summary: A new paper discusses how AI hallucinations erode user trust and proposes metacognition as a crucial mechanism for improving reliability and mitigating this issue.

items.title: Odysseus: Scaling VLMs to 100+ Turn Decision-Making in Games via Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: Odysseus presents a method for scaling Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to handle complex, multi-turn decision-making processes in games using reinforcement learning.

items.title: Singular Bank Uses ChatGPT and Codex to Accelerate Banker Workflows
items.summary: Singular Bank has adopted OpenAI's ChatGPT and Codex to streamline operations and enhance efficiency for its bankers, showcasing enterprise AI adoption in finance.
